particulars.description: Land lying to the north of 2 hill road swanage dorset & land lying to the north east side of hill road swanage dorset.

F/H property k/a development site milton square, adj 46 bell st, swanage, dorset t/no DT342246 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
